title: Honest bee status drift via the onboarding managed-hash ledger
read_first: skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs (status assembly ~:292-298 drift; crypto already imported; computeManifestHash uses sha256)
.bee/onboarding.json (managed.lib + managed.helpers per-file sha256 = the reference of record)
skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs buildManagedVersions (~:1779 — the exact hashing that produced the recorded map)
action: Per D2/D3/D4: rewrite the drift computation in bee.mjs status assembly (~:292-298) and mirror byte-identically to .bee/bin/bee.mjs. (1) Read the recorded onboarding.managed map (lib + helpers, per-file sha256) from the ledger. (2) Hash the LIVE managed files: .bee/bin/lib/*.mjs and the managed .bee/bin/*.mjs helpers (sha256, matching buildManagedVersions); derive the file set from the RECORDED map (never a hand-list, crit-pattern 20260714). (3) drift=true when any live file hash != recorded, OR the live managed file set differs (missing/extra) from recorded, OR ledger.bee_version !== BEE_VERSION (PROJ-08). (4) Keep onboarding.drift a BOOLEAN; add optional onboarding.drift_detail (array of drifted file paths, present only when drift). Report-only — status never heals. (5) Fail-open (D4): absent/legacy onboarding.managed, unreadable ledger, or I/O error => no throw; drift degrades to the version-only signal and status still renders. Add a status-drift test to test_bee_cli.mjs covering: content-edited managed lib file => drift:true + drift_detail names it; intact => drift:false, no drift_detail; missing/extra managed file => drift:true; absent managed map => renders, degrades to version-only, no throw (sentinel fail-open TEST-01).

truths: A content-edited .bee/bin/lib managed file makes bee status read onboarding.drift:true with drift_detail naming the file, even when bee_version is unchanged (PROJ-08)
An intact runtime (live hashes == recorded managed map) reads onboarding.drift:false with no drift_detail
A missing or extra managed file vs the recorded set reads drift:true
onboarding.drift stays a boolean (backward-compatible public contract); drift_detail is optional and present only on drift
Absent/legacy onboarding.managed or an unreadable ledger degrades fail-open: status renders, drift falls back to the version-only signal, never throws
templates/bee.mjs and .bee/bin/bee.mjs stay byte-identical (mirror guard green); full verify chain exits 0
artifacts: bee.mjs drift rewrite (+ mirror) comparing live .bee/bin managed hashes vs onboarding.managed
test_bee_cli.mjs status-drift test (content/file-set/version drift + fail-open sentinel)
key_links: SPEC DIST-04, PROJ-08; onboarding spec R15 (the 1b guard this builds on)
prohibitions: do not change onboarding mutation logic (1c is read-only status only)
do not reshape onboarding.drift from a boolean (consumers parse it); detail rides a separate optional field
do not hand-list the managed file set; derive it from the recorded map
do not let an absent/unreadable ledger throw — fail-open, status must always render
do not let templates/bee.mjs drift from .bee/bin/bee.mjs

trace.outcome: bee status now reports honest runtime drift: computeRuntimeDrift compares live .bee/bin/lib + managed .bee/bin helpers actual sha256 against the onboarding.json recorded managed map, plus a version and lib file-set check; any mismatch => drift:true even at the same bee_version (PROJ-08). drift stays a boolean; optional drift_detail names drifted files. Report-only + fail-open (absent/legacy ledger degrades to version-only, never throws). Mirror byte-identical. 5 new drift tests + full 11-suite chain green. E-02 false-green closed for manual/external edits (1b already blocks onboard downgrades). Classifier remains deferred to 1d/P37.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "red_failure_evidence": "BEFORE: bee.mjs:297 drift = Boolean(onboardingRaw && onboardingRaw.bee_version !== BEE_VERSION) — a content-downgraded/edited .bee/bin/lib read drift:false whenever bee_version was unchanged (the E-02 false-green). Demonstrated live: after editing bee.mjs with the OLD ledger, the new logic reads drift:true drift_detail:['.bee/bin/bee.mjs'] where the old version-only check would read false (both versions 1.0.0).",
  "verified_truths": [
    "AFTER: content-edited managed lib file => onboarding.drift:true with drift_detail naming it, at unchanged bee_version (PASS)",
    "intact runtime => drift:false, no drift_detail (PASS)",
    "missing managed file => drift:true '(missing)'; extra .mjs in lib => drift:true '(extra)' (PASS)",
    "absent/legacy managed map => status renders, drift degrades to version-only, never throws (fail-open sentinel PASS)",
    "drift stays a boolean; test_bee_cli 126 passed 0 failed; full 11-suite verify chain green; templates/bee.mjs == .bee/bin/bee.mjs byte-identical"
  ],
  "command": "node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs",
  "reconcile_note": "beegog's own onboarding.json managed map re-recorded via self-onboard --apply after the bee.mjs edit, so the repo's own status reads drift:false."
}
trace.verify_output: test_bee_cli 126 passed 0 failed (incl 5 new drift tests: intact=false, content-edit=true+names file, missing=true, extra=true, absent-ledger=fail-open); test_lib_mirror 15 files byte-identical; full 11-suite verify chain green
